text: Jab UPSC prelims ki rank aayi aur main cutoff se itna door tha, toh Mukherjee Nagar ke mere chhote se kamre mein mera dimaag bilkul sunn pad gaya. Sharma ji ka beta private mein place hokar settle ho gaya, aur main multi-year dropper banke 'sarkari babu' ka khwab dekhta reh gaya. Mujhe agle attempt ki strategy mat pucho, bas ghabrahat se meri saans phool rahi hai aur rona ruk nahi raha.

Aaj state PSC ki rank list declare hui aur mera naam cutoff se meelo door tha, jisse dekh kar main wahin zameen par dher ho gaya aur bilakhne laga. Joint family ne zameen bech kar coaching ki fees bhari thi taaki meri 'izzat' ban sake, par doston ko unki placement season mein aage badhte dekh main poori tarah toot chuka hoon. Aage answer writing ya mains ki padhai ka kuch samajh nahi aa raha, dimaag totally blank ho chuka hai.

Coaching institute ke group pe jab final rank aayi aur main cutoff clear nahi kar paya, toh sharam ke maare mera dimaag poori tarah kaam karna band kar gaya. Ek aur saal dropper banne ka stigma aur college peers ki on-campus placement wali success dekh kar mujhe lag raha hai ki sach mein 'kuch nahi hoga mera'. Agli test series ka sochne ki aukaat nahi bachi hai meri, bas room mein lock karke khud par rona aa raha hai.

SSC ki rank list mein khud ko cutoff se itna peeche dekh kar meri aatma kaanp gayi, jaise pichle chaar saal ki tayari mitti mein mil gayi ho. Dost final year ke on-campus placement le kar aage nikal gaye, aur main ek college ke back paper wale bache ki tarah is competition mein fail ho gaya hoon. Abhi next year ki tyari ya family ko munh dikhane ki koi himmat nahi bachi, main completely paralyse ho kar bas ro raha hoon.

Result PDF mein jab mera roll number nahi mila aur rank cutoff se door thi, toh wo khamoshi mujhe cheer gayi aur main wahin farsh par baith gaya. Bapuji ka 'sarkari babu' wala sapna aur meri multi-year dropper identity ke beech main itna pis chuka hoon ki baaki bacchon ke placement packages sunkar mera dum ghutne lagta hai. Mujhe kisi backup plan ya naye notes ke baare mein abhi kuch mat samjhao, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki bas cheekhne ka mann kar raha hai.
